observedBehavior: Comprehensive agent-tool smoke test found three repeatable failures: (1) managed team creation through ask_team_coordinator and team_ops_wrapper rejected creation because the public wrapper cannot provide required name/team_context fields, leaving 0 teams; (2) delegated standalone task via agent_chat_ops message completed calculations and internal plans repeatedly but the outer task stayed running/step 1 until manually paused/cancelled; (3) agent_run_ops benchmark_disposable on explicit GPT-5.6 Terra and Luna routes returned needs_assistance with empty result although prompts were trivial and agents were cleaned up.
expectedBehavior: Managed team creation should persist a team when supplied name, purpose/context, members, and goal. A delegated standalone task should terminate once its plan/result is complete. Disposable benchmarks should return their deterministic result and verified cleanup.
minimalReproduction: Reset to only Main agent and configure Terra/Luna routes.
Create two standalone agents using agent_ops spawn; chat succeeds and reports Luna route.
Send a delegated task with agent_chat_ops message to one agent. Observe correct computation in journal, repeated bg_plan completion/redeclaration, but outer task remains running at step 1.

Call ask_team_coordinator to create a two-member team. Observe agents created but no team persisted, with team_manage requiring name and team_context. Direct team_ops_wrapper manage/create reproduces same schema rejection.
Call agent_run_ops benchmark_disposable with openai_codex/gpt-5.6-terra and openai_codex/gpt-5.6-luna. Both end needs_assistance with empty result.
affectedSubsystem: Agent orchestration: managed-team wrapper/coordinator schema, delegated task finalization, disposable benchmark lifecycle, recovery runtime

attemptedRecoveries.action: Retry team creation through coordinator and direct wrapper

unresolvedUncertainty: Whether the team wrapper schema omission is in tool exposure, wrapper field mapping, or underlying team_manage validation.
Whether delegated-task non-finalization is caused by the agent repeatedly using bg_plan APIs, outer runner completion detection, or prompt/tool-policy interaction.
Why agent named Terra Tester inherited Luna route while an explicit Terra scheduled job correctly used Terra.
sanitizedSummary: Agent orchestration regression suite: standalone conversational chat and scheduled subagent jobs pass, but managed-team creation, delegated task finalization, disposable benchmark completion, and recovery runtime have reproducible failures. Test resources were fully cleaned up.
